definitions: 格兰诺拉麦片棒（一种添加糖的零食）

examples.text:
And sugar isn't just
in candies and desserts, it's also added to tomato sauce, yogurt, dried fruit,
flavored waters, or granola bars. Since sugar is everywhere,
it's important to understand how it affects the brain.

source.text: 糖类怎样影响大脑 -Nicole Avena
